steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The first sentence covers Vietnam's urbanization from 2015–2020. The second sentence covers Southeast Asia's urbanization during the same five-year window. Both trends happen simultaneously, so the transition must signal that two things are occurring at the same time.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘For example,’: Southeast Asia's trend is a parallel data point, not an example drawn from Vietnam. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘Eventually,’: Both periods overlap; there is no temporal sequence between them. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘In other words,’: The Southeast Asia figure is a new, distinct statistic — not a restatement of the Vietnam figure. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘Concurrently,’: Means 'at the same time' and correctly signals that two parallel urbanization trends unfolded during the same period. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
